name: mage
description: mage — a portable, self-maintaining knowledge base for software systems: durable notes navigable as an Obsidian graph, usable by any AI coding agent. Installs as mage:learn (capture) + mage:distill (mine the observed scratch) + the self-grooming loop mage:promote (recurrence → note) / mage:graduate (note → skill) / mage:optimize (reword/demote on context-match) + mage:guide.
